project.title: Enigma-Vehicle-Emission-Certification-Tracker
project.scenario: Emission certification & audit — accredited test centers issue tamper-evident vehicle emission certificates a regulator verifies on-chain.

tasks.title: Plan Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Test Center Registration slice.

tasks.title: Design Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Specify contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol — functions (registerTestCenter, deregisterTestCenter, transferRegulator), events, errors, storage layout.

tasks.title: Code Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Implement registerTestCenter, deregisterTestCenter, transferRegulator in contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol (clear the TODO(member1) markers).

tasks.title: Compile
tasks.desc: `forge build` is green including the Test Center Registration slice.

tasks.title: Revise after review
tasks.desc: Address PR review feedback; refactor contracts/IssuerRegistry.sol and tests.

tasks.title: Deploy Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Deploy via script/Deploy.s.sol to Anvil (then Sepolia); record addresses in config.js.

tasks.title: Test Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: `forge test --match-contract IssuerRegistryTest` passes; add edge-case + event tests.

tasks.title: Document Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Write docs/issuer-module.md and fill your README contribution row.

tasks.title: Present Test Center Registration
tasks.desc: Record a demo video + slide deck and link them under Deliverables.

tasks.title: Plan Certificate Issuance
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Certificate Issuance slice.

tasks.title: Design Certificate Issuance
tasks.desc: Specify contracts/RecordRegistry.sol — functions (issueCertificate), events, errors, storage layout.

tasks.title: Code Certificate Issuance
tasks.desc: Implement issueCertificate in contracts/RecordRegistry.sol (clear the TODO(member2) markers).

tasks.title: Compile
tasks.desc: `forge build` is green including the Certificate Issuance slice.

tasks.title: Revise after review

tasks.title: Deploy Certificate Issuance

tasks.desc: `forge test --match-contract RecordRegistryTest` passes; add edge-case + event tests.

tasks.title: Document Certificate Issuance
tasks.desc: Write docs/record-module.md and fill your README contribution row.

tasks.title: Present Certificate Issuance
tasks.desc: Record a demo video + slide deck and link them under Deliverables.

tasks.title: Plan Transfer / Revoke / Audit
tasks.desc: Define roles, acceptance criteria and a sequence diagram for the Transfer / Revoke / Audit slice.
